---
title: "Faculty & Affiliates"
---

## Resident Faculty

**D. R. Caldera** — *Director Emeritus.* Founding director (1974–1998).
Interests: renormalization, the history of QED.

**M. Yucca** — *Senior Fellow.* Effective field theories, anomalous magnetic
moments, dimensional regularization.

**A. Ocotillo** — *Fellow.* Lattice gauge theory; non-perturbative aspects
of the Schwinger model.

## Visiting Scholars

- **J. Saguaro** (Sonoran Polytechnic) — Resummation in soft-collinear
  effective theory.
- **L. Bristlecone** — *Visiting Philosopher in Residence.* Foundations of
  quantum mechanics; metaphysics of spacetime; the interpretation of
  probability. In residence three or four times each year.

## Associates

- **R. Cholla** — Independent affiliate; Casimir energies in non-trivial
  backgrounds.
- **E. Mesquite** — Corresponding member; observational cosmology.

A small number of further corresponding members contribute occasional
notes and review preprints in their areas of expertise.
